use_cases: Displaying features or services in a visually organized grid layout for product pages
Creating responsive dashboard interfaces with mixed content types
Building portfolio or showcase sections with varied card sizes
Organizing diverse content elements like text, images, and CTAs in a unified grid
Designing landing pages with modular card-based sections
ai_summary: A modular Bento Grid layout system for React with composable card components (BentoCard, BentoTitle, BentoDescription, BentoContent) that arranges diverse content in a responsive CSS Grid. Features a 6-column responsive grid structure with dark mode support and rounded corners, suitable for creating modern feature showcases, dashboards, or portfolio layouts across SaaS, e-commerce, and media platforms.
